image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about atherosclerosis basics.
Context visual: Atherosclerosis is when arteries thicken due to plaque buildup. But why does this happen?
Escalation visual: It's linked to factors like cholesterol, inflammation, and even genetics. Ever wondered how these interact?
Evidence visual: Recent studies suggest that lifestyle changes can reverse early-stage atherosclerosis. That's promising, right?
Payoff visual: Understanding this helps us take charge of our heart health. Simple changes can make a huge difference!
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper? Hit that follow button for more science insights!
